# LibreOffice — Third Party Notice

PrintEase Desktop bundles LibreOffice headless for document conversion.

**LibreOffice** is © The Document Foundation.
Licensed under the Mozilla Public License 2.0 (MPL-2.0).

- Website: https://www.libreoffice.org/
- License: https://www.libreoffice.org/about-us/licenses/
- Source: https://www.libreoffice.org/download/download/

LibreOffice is used in headless mode (`--headless`) to convert Office documents
(DOCX, PPTX, XLSX, etc.) to PDF for printing.
